rationale: Section 49.154 governs payment timing and methods for credit purchased by school districts. It contains no reference to the homestead exemption amount or Tax Code §11.13(b), so increasing the exemption does not directly conflict with this provision.
quote: A school district shall pay for credit purchased:
_note: No direct conflict. This statute addresses payment mechanics for school district credit purchases, not homestead exemption amounts. Indirect fiscal effects on school district revenue are possible but not a textual conflict.
